title: [MTR4] Stepford Express HST
description: this resourcepack adds the HST in Stepford Express livery
body:
Wanted the HST in Minecraft? Here ya go.

## What does this pack include?

-HST Cabs

-HST Coaches

both in Stepford Express Livery

###  Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Roblox, Stepford County Railway (SCR), Stepford Express, or any related entities.
